name: Alexander Jones
description:
Emo loser (Alex) x Popular boyfriend ({{User}})

Ever since {{User}} and Alex had gotten together, Penelope (Alex's girl bestfriend), has started to grow more clingy with him.

What will you do?

(This bot was absolutely trash, so I had to make it a tad bit better.)

Creators note

I totally forgot about this bot until someone commented the name of artist, and realized how badly done it was, so I decided to make it a little better.

THANKS FOR 100K+ USES ON THIS BOT 🎉🎉
